phrases.text_local: Où est le service de détaxe ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh leh sair-VEES duh day-TAKS
phrases.cultural_note: Bring passport and receipts; minimum spend rules apply for tax refunds.

responses.english: Tax refund is on the ground floor, near the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: leh sair-VEES day-TAKS eh oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY, pray duh lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL
responses.local: Le service détaxe est au rez-de-chaussée, près de l'entrée principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if rooftop terrace is open
phrases.text_local: La terrasse sur le toit est ouverte ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah teh-RASS sur leh twah eh oo-VAIRT
phrases.cultural_note: Rooftop access can close temporarily in poor weather.

responses.english: Yes, the rooftop is open today, but be careful of the wind.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah teh-RASS eh oo-VAIRT oh-zhoor-DWEE, may ah-tah-SYON oh vahn
responses.local: Oui, la terrasse est ouverte aujourd'hui, mais attention au vent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which building has gourmet food hall
phrases.text_local: Lequel des bâtiments a l'espace gourmet ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh-KEL day bah-tee-MON ah les-PASS goor-MAY
phrases.cultural_note: Galeries has multiple buildings—Coupole, Homme, and Gourmet sections.

responses.english: The food hall is in the Gourmet building, next to the Opéra.
responses.phonetic: leh food hol eh dahn leh bah-tee-MON goor-MAY, ah koh-TAY duh loh-pay-RAH
responses.local: Le food hall est dans le bâtiment Gourmet, à côté de l'Opéra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find women's fashion floor
phrases.text_local: La mode femme est à quel étage ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah mohd fam eh tah kel ay-TAZH
phrases.cultural_note: Store maps at entrances save time in this multi-building complex.

responses.english: The women's department is on the second floor, in the main building.
responses.phonetic: leh ray-YON fam eh oh day-ZYEM ay-TAZH, dahn leh bah-tee-MON preen-see-PAL
responses.local: Le rayon femmes est au deuxième étage, dans le bâtiment principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they can ship purchases to hotel
phrases.text_local: Vous pouvez livrer mes achats à l'hôtel ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo poo-VAY lee-VRAY may zah-SHA ah loh-TEL
phrases.cultural_note: Delivery options vary by spend amount and destination.

responses.english: Yes, for purchases over 100 euros, free delivery to your hotel.
responses.phonetic: wee, poor lay zah-SHA oh-duh-SUH duh sohx-oor oh-roh, lee-vray-SYON gra-TWEET ah voter oh-TEL
responses.local: Oui, pour les achats au-dessus de 100 euros, livraison gratuite à votre hôtel.
